title: In chaotic SoloQ, rebuild the game through small wins
body: When the map is unstable, you do not always need one heroic play to carry. Often the best path back into the game is to accumulate small wins: one kill, one flash, one traded camp, one objective, one protected wave. Small wins stabilize the game state without forcing desperation.
actionables: When the game feels chaotic, ask what the smallest useful win on the map is right now.
Avoid all-in recovery attempts if a smaller gain keeps your tempo and your gold intact.
Review comeback games by identifying the first three small wins that rebuilt the position.

source.title: Solving The #1 SoloQ Problem (How To Carry Bad Teams) — Jungle Guide
source.notes: Built from Leo's idea that unstable games are often recovered through accumulated small wins, not one giant force.
